perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with close-up shots of a woman with orange-dyed hair, her expression is somber as she looks out over a body of water during sunset. (2) The scene transitions into a rapid montage: lighting candles on a cake, looking out of a car window, and a silhouette of a woman in a wedding dress. (3) The woman is seen in a supermarket aisle wearing a Nirvana t-shirt, followed by shots of her crying and holding her head in her hands. (4) Dark liquid drips onto pink lily flowers as the woman lies underwater or in a dark space, ending with close-ups of the wilting, stained flowers.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A melancholic piano melody starts, setting a sad tone. (2) A male voice begins singing a ballad in Mandarin Chinese with a soulful and emotional delivery. (3) The music intensifies with the addition of drums and strings as the vocal pitch rises. (4) The audio fades out with a final piano chord and very soft ambient wind noise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text: Song lyrics in Traditional Chinese appear on screen such as '怎麼就這麼輕易' (How is it so easy) and '敗給了時間' (Lost to time). (2) Decorative text: '結婚式招待状' (Wedding invitation) appears on a piece of paper, emphasizing the theme of a past relationship or lost future. (3) The tone of the text is consistently poetic and heartbroken.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a montage structure, shifting from present-day melancholy to fragmented memories of a past relationship.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character with orange hair, 1 female character with dark hair appearing in memories.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with shoulder-length orange/pink hair, wearing a black sweatshirt with 'Nirvana' text and a dark overall dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Diverse locations including a brightly lit supermarket aisle, a dim room with a desk, and the back seat of a moving car.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural golden hour light mixed with moody, low-key indoor lighting.
visual_scene_and_style.colorTone: Cinematic and slightly desaturated with blue and purple hues.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a music video for a sentimental ballad, using a series of symbolic and nostalgic images to convey the pain of a breakup and the lingering presence of memories. It juxtaposes everyday activities with deep emotional distress to emphasize the difficulty of moving on.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-contrast lighting and vertical text integration.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of black ink on flowers is a strong visual metaphor for the corruption of beautiful memories.
